title: antrophyum citrifolium
intro: Antrophyum citrifolium, also known as the umbrella fern, is a tropical plant species native to Australia and Asia, characterized by its unique umbrella-shaped fronds. The medicinal properties of Antrophyum citrifolium lie in its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, treating skin irritations and wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Antrophyum citrifolium is typically prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its leaves can also be applied topically as a poultice or infused in oil for skin and wound care.
